subject: fix(deps): resolve non-breaking dependency vulnerabilities
body:
npm audit fix for picomatch, minimatch, and brace-expansion — ReDoS
and method injection in glob-matching libs. Build-time only.
serialize-javascript chain left as-is (requires breaking vite-plugin-pwa
downgrade).

Tags: dependencies, security
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: security
Semver: patch
